narrative:
Rushcreek B (precinct in Fairfield County) has 1,030 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.5 percentage points.
